allow: PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(30\); $ok = $false; while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8511/_stcore/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ok = $true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 } }; if \($ok\) { Write-Output "SERVER UP" } else { Write-Output "SERVER NOT RESPONDING" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8511" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\), bytes: $\($r.RawContentLength\)" } catch { Write-Output "FAIL: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($edge = "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $edge\)\) { $edge = "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe" }; $out = Join-Path $env:TEMP "fsae_app_home.png"; & $edge --headless=new --disable-gpu --screenshot=$out --window-size=1680,1050 --virtual-time-budget=20000 "http://127.0.0.1:8511" 2>$null | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; if \(Test-Path $out\) { Write-Output "SHOT: $out \($\(\(Get-Item $out\).Length\) bytes\)" } else { Write-Output "NO SCREENSHOT" })

PowerShell($edge = "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $edge\)\) { $edge = "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe" }; $out = Join-Path $env:TEMP "fsae_app_home2.png"; & $edge --headless=new --disable-gpu --screenshot=$out --window-size=1680,1050 --timeout=25000 --force-color-profile=srgb "http://127.0.0.1:8511" 2>$null | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; if \(Test-Path $out\) { Write-Output "SHOT: $out \($\(\(Get-Item $out\).Length\) bytes\)" })
PowerShell($target = Join-Path $env:TEMP "selenium_pkgs"; & ".venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -m pip install --quiet --target $target selenium; Write-Output "installed to $target")

PowerShell(Remove-Item "_shot.py" -Confirm:$false; Remove-Item \(Join-Path $env:TEMP "selenium_pkgs"\) -Recurse -Force -Confirm:$false; & ".venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -m py_compile app.py; if \($?\) { Write-Output "FINAL COMPILE OK" })
